positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a mystical forest creature—a playful fox mixed with an ethereal owl—sitting in a serene meadow at sunrise. The composition should feature a clear, dynamic silhouette against a gradient backdrop of warm oranges, soft violets, and misty blues. The art style must be bold, high-contrast vector illustration with clean line art and block coloring, reminiscent of modern fairytale folklore prints. Focus on intricate details in the fur texture and feather tips, using flat color fields with sharp edges. Ensure the central figure is perfectly centered and highly visible for apparel printing. Use soft rim lighting to enhance the edges of the creature's silhouette.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, messy lines, poor composition, amateur, gradient gradients, gradients, photorealism, 3d render, excessive detail, cluttered
